zh.lifeSummary: 當John Launcelyn於1434年出生在英國哈普爾時，他的父親Roger Launcelyn35歲，母親Mrs. Roger Launcelyn29歲。他和Mrs. John Launcelyn至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1510年享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Launcelyn于1434年出生在英国哈普爾时，他的父亲Roger Launcelyn35岁，母亲Mrs. Roger Launcelyn29岁。他和Mrs. John Launcelyn至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1510年享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Launcelyn was born in 1434, in Hampshire, England, his father, Roger Launcelyn, was 35 and his mother, Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Mrs. John Launcelyn. He died in 1510, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Launcelyn est né en 1434, à Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Launcelyn, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Mrs. John Launcelyn. Il est décédé en 1510, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Launcelyn 1434 in Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Launcelyn 35 und seine Mutter Mrs. Roger Launcelyn 29. Er hatte mit Mrs. John Launcelyn mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1510 im Alter von 76 Jahren und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Launcelyn è nato il nel 1434 nel Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Launcelyn, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Mrs. John Launcelyn. Morì nel 1510, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Launcelynが1434年にイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger Launcelynは35歳，母Mrs. Roger Launcelynは29歳であった。彼はMrs. John Launcelynとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1510年に76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Launcelyn(이)가 1434년 영국 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Launcelyn(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Roger Launcelyn(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mrs. John Launcelyn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Cople, Bedford Borough, Bedfordshire, En: Bedford, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Launcelyn nasceu em 1434, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Launcelyn, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Mrs. John Launcelyn. Ele faleceu em 1510, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Launcelyn родился в 1434 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Launcelyn было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Mrs. John Launcelyn. Он умер в 1510 г. в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Launcelyn nació en 1434, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Launcelyn, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs. Roger Launcelyn, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Mrs. John Launcelyn. Murió en 1510, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
